Agents CLI Workflows Install GitHub
All Workflows
CI/CD Integration

Continuous Quality Loop

Agents continuously monitor code health metrics — coverage, a11y, bundle size, lint, types, dependencies — and proactively fix regressions before they compound.

epost-tester epost-a11y-specialist epost-code-reviewer epost-fullstack-developer epost-git-manager

Monitored Metrics

Test Coverage

≥ 80%

Generate missing tests for uncovered functions

epost-tester

A11y Score

WCAG 2.1 AA

Fix ARIA, contrast, keyboard, focus issues

epost-a11y-specialist

Bundle Size

< budget per route

Identify and extract heavy dependencies

epost-code-reviewer

Lint Health

0 errors

Auto-fix lint errors, flag unfixable for review

epost-fullstack-developer

Type Safety

0 type errors

Fix type mismatches, update interfaces

epost-fullstack-developer

Dependency Health

0 known CVEs

Upgrade vulnerable packages, verify compatibility

epost-code-reviewer

The Loop

1

Monitor

Scheduled health check runs metrics against thresholds

2

Detect

Identify which metrics have degraded since last check

3

Diagnose

Find the commits that caused the regression

4

Fix

Generate targeted fixes on a quality branch

5

Verify

Run full test suite on the fix branch

6

Report

Open PR with before/after metrics comparison

Health Report

quality-report — 2026-03-12 5/6 passing
✓ Coverage
84%
✓ A11y Score
96%
! Bundle Size
+8kb
✓ Lint
0
✓ Types
0
✓ Dependencies
0 CVE
Auto-fix PR opened for bundle regression: fix/quality-bundle-260312
◈

Quality Debt Stops Compounding

Without continuous monitoring, small regressions accumulate until they become large refactoring projects. This loop catches degradation within hours — when the fix is a one-line change instead of a week-long sprint. Prevention is cheaper than cure.

◈ epost_agent_kit v2.0.0
Works with any AI coding assistant
